body_txt: At this trope's most extreme, the positive parent is The Power of Love incarnate and the negative parent is a Complete Monster . If the Cruel Parent is that bad or just close enough to that bad, then this trope can result in an Archnemesis Dad or Evil Matriarch (depending on the gender), or it can lead to Offing the Offspring . Due to Double Standards concerning gender assumptions, usually the mother is the loving parent and the father is the violent one, though gender inversions over those stereotypes do exist. Despite this, it could also occur to parents of the same sex, including Parental Substitutes . In addition, this issue is not biologically exclusive; even the Parental Substitute variety could count, so long as it contextually correlates to parenthood. Sometimes, the parents' differences can also affect their relationship with each other and not just their relationship with their child, and in extreme cases, this can lead to a Custody Battle or even Til Murder Do Us Part . This trope can be a negative result of Opposites Attract . Sometimes it can be even subverted if the Good Parent turns out to be more of a Bitch in Sheep's Clothing who enables the child's worst qualities while the Abusive Parent is a Cruel to Be Kind Well-Intentioned Extremist who wants the child to be good . Can overlap with All Abusers Are Male , Archnemesis Dad , Bumbling Dad , Evil Matriarch ; Stern Parent, Doting Parent (in extreme cases), or Notorious Parent . It can also overlap with Motherhood Is Superior , Stay in the Kitchen , Women Are Wiser and Men Use Violence, Women Use Communication . Hates Their Parent and Disowned Parent (Cruel Parent) can also result from this, as can Momma's Boy , Daddy's Girl or "Well Done, Son" Guy . If the loving parent fails to protect their child from the cruel parent despite their personal kindness, they may also end up being a Useless Bystander Parent . Can overlap with Deceased Parents Are the Best when the loving parent dies and the child is stuck with the cruel parent for angst. Contrast Abusive Offspring and Antagonistic Offspring . Note: This trope is for In-Universe examples only, and No Real Life Examples, Please! noreallife
